calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-05-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Petitioner: Xinling Ye, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Henry Heng Chen, and with Cantonese Interpreter: Charles Zhang.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Henry Ye.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-14-2005 Reset To May-05-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: J. Vickstein.
Petitioner: Xinling Yee, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Henry Heng Chen, and with Cantonese Interpreter: Charles Zhang.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent, proof of service of notice, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to May 5, 2005 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-05-2005 Reset To Apr-14-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
